description: Event-ready Codex workflow that designs, assets, implements, runs Bun inside Docker, reviews, iterates, and snapshots SolidJS websites.

prompts.rielaPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Normalize the user's direct request or chat event feedback, then run site-design, asset-generate, server-node, bun-container-server, source-commit-message, git-commit, and review-node. The design node must choose and pin the CSS framework and all allowed website libraries before implementation. The server node must create or revise a SolidJS site without running Bun on the host. The bun-container-server node must build the packaged lightweight Bun Docker image, bind-mount the repository, run Bun install/build/server commands in Docker, and return a review URL. The source commit step snapshots generated website source after each server/container pass. The review node must use Playwright against the running server, assess the site, and route back to site-design for product/design or dependency-policy problems, asset-generate for image or asset problems, or server-node for implementation/runtime problems. Finish only when review accepts the running site with no high or middle findings.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep event provenance, target directory, pinned design stack, dependency allowlist, asset paths, Docker/Bun server URL, git snapshot intent, Playwright checks, findings, route booleans, and residual risks explicit.

steps.description: Normalize direct workflow input or chat event feedback for website creation or iteration.
Create or revise the site design brief and pinned CSS/library allowlist from the request, feedback, and latest review findings.
Create or revise website image and media assets required by the current design.
Implement or revise the SolidJS/Bun website source without running Bun on the host.
Run Bun install/build/server inside the packaged Docker image with the repository mounted at /workspace.
Prepare a git snapshot commit message and exact generated source file list after the server-node pass.
Commit the generated website snapshot so the site can be restored through git history.
Use Playwright against the Docker-hosted Bun server, review the website, and choose the next improvement route.
Publish the accepted website build result after Playwright review passes.

rielaPackage.title: codex-website-builder
rielaPackage.description: Event-ready Codex workflow that designs, assets, implements, runs Bun inside Docker, reviews, iterates, and snapshots SolidJS websites.
